meaning: n.森林,林木,<英>御猎场adj.森林的,住在森林中的vt.植树于
examples: We need to preserve the forest.
Forest fires were raging out of control.
Much of the country is covered by forest.
After the wide-open water of the estuary, the mangrove forest feels eerie and magical.
As they disappeared into the forest, I heard loud whoops and whistles echoing off the trees.
